title: Deguelia glabrata
taxonomy: Deguelia glabrata is classified as a species of plant in the Fabaceae family, which is a large and diverse family of legumes. It is a member of the genus Deguelia, which contains several species of trees and shrubs native to tropical regions. The genus Deguelia is part of the tribe Dipterygeae, which is a group of legumes that are primarily found in Central and South America. Deguelia glabrata is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, where it grows as a shrub or small tree. The exact classification of Deguelia glabrata is as follows: genus - Deguelia, species - D. glabrata, family - Fabaceae.
